_description: Flux-pattern learnings schema. Adapted from enchanted-plugins/flux. 2026-04-18.

_fields.sessions: Array of {date, topic, outcome} — one entry per steal/round session
_fields.strategy_stats: Object keyed by strategy_id: {applied, reverted, consecutive_failures, last_used}
_fields.negative_examples: Last 15 entries: {date, fcode, description, what_failed, why}
_fields.confidence_scores: Object keyed by strategy_id: {score_0_to_1, last_updated, decay_per_session: 0.10}
_fields.recommendations: Array of {generated_date, basis_fcode, text, status: pending|accepted|rejected}

_patterns.stuck: strategy applied >= 3 times with no revert but outcome unchanged
_patterns.co_occurring: two weaknesses appearing together in >= 3 fix_history entries
